---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / Motivation

What problem does this solve? Who benefits and in what scenario?

## Proposed Solution

Describe what you'd like to see added or changed.

## Alternatives Considered

Any other approaches you considered and why you ruled them out.

## Additional Context

Mockups, links, or examples that help illustrate the request.
